content: Just as Self-Refine enables LLMs to iteratively improve initial outputs without external supervision or training by leveraging structured self-feedback, Reflexion can be augmented with Self-Refine’s stepwise feedback loop to turn its unstructured dynamic memory reflection into targeted, incremental capability gains for autonomous agents. This creates a two-tier self-improvement stack where lightweight output-level refinement (from Self-Refine) feeds into higher-order agent memory and reasoning refinement (from Reflexion).
